name: nnscholar-research-suite
runtime_notes: Codex registers only the root nnscholar-research-suite skill.
Only current NNScholar workflow ids are routed by the root SKILL.md router.
Desktop workflow buttons remain UI presets and send structured workflow payloads to the suite.
Internal workflow entry files are named WORKFLOW.md so they are not exposed as separate Codex skills.
The root references/companion-skill-bridge.md maps NNScholar stages to co-installed specialist skills such as radiology, biomedical evidence, Nature-style writing, and file-format skills.
The root references/zotero-example-atlas.md provides copyright-safe top-journal structural example cards derived from the user's Zotero library.
The assets/zotero-figure-examples/manifest.json file indexes reusable CC BY figure screenshot references for figure-layout inspiration.
